title: Flitter (planet)

'''Flitter''' was the codename for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]] in the [[Tierfon system/Legends|Tierfon system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Flitter became a graphic example of why the Rebellion needed to keep its safe [[Planet/Legends|world]] locations secret after an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] captured an [[Unidentified Alliance Support Services transport|Alliance transport]] bound for the planet and discovered its existence. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] responded by leveling Flitter's [[City/Legends|cities]] and [[Poison/Legends|poisoning]] its ecosystem with air-dropped toxins. Because the Imperial attack occurred in the dead of one of Flitter's harsh [[Winter/Legends|winters]], the Empire merely stationed a pair of [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and left the rest of the planet's [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] to [[Death/Legends|die]]. By the next [[Spring/Legends|spring]], 95 percent of Flitter's population of over 40,000 had succumbed to starvation or exposure.

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Flitter was located in the [[Tierfon system/Legends|Tierfon system]]<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" /> of the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]],<ref name="Atlas Online Companion" /> within the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion<ref name="Trans-Hydian" /> of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="Atlas Online Companion" /> Flitter was a temperate world with a cool [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]], a [[Water/Legends|moist]] [[Hydrosphere/Legends|hydrosphere]], very cold [[Winter/Legends|winter]] seasons, and terrain primarily comprising [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]], plains, glaciers, and [[Forest/Legends|forests]].<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" />

Flitter featured a Type I [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] breathable<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> for [[Human/Legends|Humans]]<ref name="Planets Collection" /> and standard [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]. A [[Standard day/Legends|day]] on Flitter lasted twenty-five [[Galactic Standard Calendar|standard hours]], and a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] 378 local days. Flitter's fauna included [[grub]]s.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" />

==History==
===Rebel Alliance safe world===
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], agents of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] routinely [[Death/Legends|eliminated]] family members of known [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel as a form of [[Terrorist/Legends|terror]]. In response, the [[Support Services/Legends|Alliance Support Services]] branch established a number of remote [[Safe world/Legends|safe worlds]], where Rebel sympathizers and their families could safely live free of Imperial oppression.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> "Flitter" became the codename for one of these safe worlds, located in the Tierfon [[Star system/Legends|system]],<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" /> which also included the planet [[Tierfon/Legends|Tierfon]],<ref name="Atlas Online Companion" /> home of the [[Tierfon Rebel Outpost]].<ref name="CSWE-Tierfon">{{CSWECite|III|247|Tierfon}}</ref>

Eventually, Flitter's population swelled to over 40,000 [[Gender/Legends|men]], women, and children, more than twice the average population of a Rebel safe world, and the planet became a prominent producer of [[Ore/Legends|ores]] for conversion into [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]]. However, an [[Unidentified Alliance Support Services transport|Alliance Support Services transport]] was captured<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> by an Imperial [[Starship/Legends|starship]]<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" /> en route to Flitter, and the [[Transport/Legends|transport's]] [[Unidentified Alliance Support Services pilot|pilot]] talked under Imperial interrogation,<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> revealing the safe world's location to the Empire.<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" />

===Imperial discovery===
Within one [[Standard month/Legends|month's]] [[Time/Legends|time]],<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> the Empire laid waste to Flitter. An Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] destroyed many of the planet's [[City/Legends|cities]]<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" /> and [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] all of the nearby land and forests with air-dropped toxins,<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> contaminating much of Flitter's ecology.<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" /> The Imperial attack came in the dead of winter—rather than dispatching ground [[Troop/Legends|troops]] to the planet surface, the Empire simply posted a pair of [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and let Flitter's elements take their toll. By the time [[Spring/Legends|spring]] arrived, more than 95 percent of the safe world's population had died from starvation or exposure. The remaining survivors scattered and hid in caves, subsisting on grubs and [[Tree/Legends|tree]] bark.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" />

By [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] is set between the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], "ending with the establishment of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Echo Base/Legends|base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]." ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the establishment of Echo Base on Hoth to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].</ref> Flitter's population numbered only 1,000. The Rebellion desperately wished to rescue the Flitter survivors but as of that year was unable to muster enough firepower to challenge the Imperial [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] around the planet. Flitter thus became a graphic example of the Rebellion's need to keep its safe worlds secret.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" />

==Inhabitants==
Flitter's [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] population ranged from Humans to many other [[Species/Legends|species]], and the populace lived at a feudal technology level, with no [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]]. Following the Imperial attack on Flitter, the planetary government degraded into anarchy, and Flitter itself afforded no major imports or exports.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" />

==Locations==
Flitter hosted one [[Flitter's major city|major city]] for its refugee population, which was summarily turned into rubble following the Imperial attack on the planet.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition" /> A number of other cities were similarly destroyed.<ref name="CSWE-Flitter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Flitter was created for the [[October]] [[1990]] [[West End Games]] ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'', written by [[Paul Murphy]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. ''Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'' presented Flitter as an example of a Rebel Alliance safe world.<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, First Edition">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref>
